ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion */,
  "asia_size" INTEGER /* Shoe size in ASIA standard */,
  "eu_size" INTEGER /* Shoe size in EU standard */,
  "us_size" REAL /* Shoe size in US standard */,
  "uk_size" REAL /* Shoe size in UK standard */,
  "foot_length_cm" REAL /* Length of the foot in centimeters */,
  "conversion_type" TEXT /* Type of conversion (e.g., Men, Women, Kids) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the conversion data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "preferred_region" TEXT /* Preferred region for size conversion (e.g., ASIA, EU, US, UK) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the customer's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_preferred_region FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_region") REFERENCES regions ("region_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "foot_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each foot measurement */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer whose foot is measured */,
  "foot_length_cm" REAL /* Length of the foot in centimeters */,
  "foot_width_cm" REAL /* Width of the foot in centimeters */,
  "heel_to_ball_cm" REAL /* Distance from heel to ball of the foot in centimeters */,
  "heel_to_toe_cm" REAL /* Distance from heel to toe of the foot in centimeters */,
  "ball_to_toe_cm" REAL /* Distance from ball to toe of the foot in centimeters */,
  "arch_height_cm" REAL /* Height of the arch in centimeters */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date the measurement was taken */,
  "left_right" TEXT /* Left or right foot */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_foot_measurements_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer receiving the recommendation */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the foot measurement used for the recommendation */,
  "asia_size" INTEGER /* Recommended shoe size in ASIA standard */,
  "eu_size" INTEGER /* Recommended shoe size in EU standard */,
  "us_size" REAL /* Recommended shoe size in US standard */,
  "uk_size" REAL /* Recommended shoe size in UK standard */,
  "date_recommended" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  "recommended_by" TEXT /* User who made the recommendation */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the recommendation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or recommendations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES foot_measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., Men, Women, Kids) */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style of the product (e.g., Sneakers, Boots, Sandals) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "size_chart_url" TEXT /* URL of the size chart for the product */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the product is manufactured */,
  "is_discounted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is discounted */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage if the product is discounted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "asia_size" INTEGER /* Available shoe size in ASIA standard */,
  "eu_size" INTEGER /* Available shoe size in EU standard */,
  "us_size" REAL /* Available shoe size in US standard */,
  "uk_size" REAL /* Available shoe size in UK standard */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product size in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the stock quantity was last updated */,
  "is_pre_order" INTEGER /* Indicates if the size is available for pre-order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "asia_size", "eu_size", "us_size", "uk_size")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "delivery_method" TEXT /* Delivery method (e.g., standard, express) */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "asia_size" INTEGER /* Shoe size in ASIA standard */,
  "eu_size" INTEGER /* Shoe size in EU standard */,
  "us_size" REAL /* Shoe size in US standard */,
  "uk_size" REAL /* Shoe size in UK standard */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "is_gift" INTEGER /* Indicates if the item is a gift */,
  "gift_message" TEXT /* Gift message provided by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, sales representative, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (if applicable) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource being accessed (e.g., customer, product, order) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., ASIA, EU, US, UK) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the region */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language used in the region */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the region */,
  "currency_symbol" TEXT /* Currency symbol used in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)
